title: dunbaria circinalis
intro: Dunbaria circinalis, also known as the Climbing Dunbaria, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dunbaria circinalis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Dunbaria circinalis is often made into a decoction or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water, or it can be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tea.
